description:
★ | maybe the so called scary guy has a soft spot too?

A stereotypical jock... has a goodie twoshoe as his type. What could go wrong besides the fact that he only wants this girl to tend his battle wounds.

(completely self indulgent if you can't tell...) You could say that this is a rejuvenation of my old Character AI bots which are shorter than 500 characters, and I've tried to made it more descriptive now. By the way, is c.ai removing bots by their system? My basketball Yunho bot got removed?

Anyways, I kinda molded reader as a single prototype, but it's still up to you if you wanna perceive her/yourself as a teacher's oet or not. Have a good day! xoxo💋

Edit: holy moly... 11k on a chatbot???? u mingi stans are so hardcore ily all mwah 💕💕💕
